title: Overheard at the Market
description: Mixing, selling, and debunking records all point toward a single pair. Deduce what potion they produce.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing6 and ing7, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing6=R+ (ing6 R?: (sign undetermined)), ing7=R- (ing7 R?: (sign undetermined))
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing6=G- (ing6 has G-), ing7=G- (ing7 has G-)
      → SAME sign - → G- resolves.
